post.content: looks like hungarian algorithm question to me. Similar problem : https://leetcode.com/problems/maximum-number-of-accepted-invitations/description/

As mentioned by someone else, similar to invitations problem.
To map the problem, take person on on part of bipartite graph and tickets to other part.
Person pi will have edge to ticket (t1,t2) assigned to them.
Find maximum bipartite matching, if total matching equals number of person, return true .
Could you explain the input structure
